conventions.name: credentials-export-matching-class
conventions.description: Credential files must export a credential class with the same name as the file stem.

conventions.name: top-level-nodes-export-matching-class
conventions.description: Top-level node entry files must export a node class with the same name as their directory and file stem.

conventions.name: memory-nodes-export-matching-class
conventions.description: Session memory node entry files must export a node class with the same name as their directory and file stem.

conventions.name: channel-companion-node-layout
conventions.description: Channel companion adapters must keep the shared node, store, transport, and type file layout.

conventions.name: channel-companion-description-export
conventions.description: Channel companion description modules must export their named n8n node description constant.

conventions.name: channel-companion-execute-export
conventions.description: Channel companion execute modules must export the n8n execute handler.

conventions.name: channel-companion-webhook-export
conventions.description: Channel companion webhook modules must export the n8n webhook handler.

conventions.name: channel-companion-store-api
conventions.description: Channel companion pending HITL stores must expose the shared pending-store API.

conventions.name: channel-companion-transport-api
conventions.description: Channel companion transports must expose approval and question send functions.
